entry.title: Re: TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'g...
entry.content:
Hello Jain !

Thank you for you reply. the background is, it is a new Test tenant copy of Production system SAC. Here i tried to change data models with same BW query and also tried to update widgets with same data model. Unfortunately, the error still exist in the system.

In new story perspective, Yes i am able to create new but the need here is should be able to work/do changes on copied widgets during tenant copy.

entry.title: Re: Buyoffs in SAP Digital Manufacturing: Streamlining Approvals and Enhancing Compliance
entry.content:
Great content. I'm new at studying SAP Manufacturing.

What would be a translation in portuguese for this feature designated Buyoffs?

Thanks,

Paloma

entry.title: Re: Allowable Special Characters in Material Master Descr...
entry.content:
In my opinion & experience below mentioned special characters (|  ")also to be avoided since they create issues while extracting data into MS excel spreadsheets

| in the middle of a description since it will create a separate column while downloading into a spreadsheet file in T-Codes like MC.9

" at the end of description since the data will be combined with available data in subsequent rows while extracting into a spreadsheet file

#MaterialMaster #MasterDataManagement SAP Master Data Governance #MasterDataGovernance

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Release 2024.07
entry.content:
Hello, 

why are the following new functions not supported in Live-Connection?

  • Rank with others – view top-N and bottom-N in comparison to other data points
  • Use Wildcards When Filtering by Conditions

Best regards, Katharina

entry.title: error on using "case" instead of "if" with "Application.getActivePage()"
entry.content:
Hello,

I once again need your help:

I have a Story with various graphs and tables where I want to switch the dimensions. It is working fine with the graphs with this coding:

Chart_NWC_TABO_Ratio_Cons.removeMeasure("5WIFOPY8PE02JBZRPE1NYRFF8",Feed.ValueAxis);
Chart_NWC_TABO_Ratio_Cons.addMeasure("5WIFOPY8PE02JBZRPE1NYQDHW",Feed.ValueAxis);

 So now I try to do the same with tables, which is working:

Table_NWC_TABD_KPI_Cons.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("5WIFOPY8PE02JBZRPE1NYQ76C",["5WIFOPY8PE02JBZRPE1NYQQ50","5WIFOPY8PE02JBZRPE1NYQJTG","5WIFOPY8PE02JBZRPE1NYQDHW"]);

I just have a big BUT: I am not capable of sorting the dimension the way I want it. The order should be the same as within the query (Total NetSales, NWC GC, NWC ratio). I do not find a way of changing the order. The technical names within the coding are also in the correct order.

Whatever I try, i always get this wrong order (no clue, where this even comes from):

Thanks and BR 

Clemens

entry.title: Create Candidate Profile field in Offer Detail
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Our customer request that some fields from Candidate Profile must appear on Offer Approval. However, I have checked Manage Template and found out that there is no standard fields from Candidate Profile for Offer Detail template. 

Does anyone have the solution or workaround for this case? (We would like to pull data from Candidate Profile to appear on Offer Detail UI). 

Any idea is highly appreciated.

Many thanks!

Vuong

entry.title: Integration with External IDP like, Active Directory
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have a requirement,

My client has 2 type of customers

1. Public -  Normal B2C Registered users

2. Employees- They have an employee ID and password and their all access are currently validated with Active Directory or some external system

For PUBLIC Users, They will register in CDC and direct USER validation happen in CDC.

Now, For their employees, have to login with to the system with Active Directory validation.

User will be validated in Active directory, There are two scenarios

1. If The mail id not exist in CDC, User should be created in CDC without any password information. This is just for making all data in CDC and some role validations 

2. If the user already exists, Then, User data, which is coming from Active Directory should be updated CDC

 

Is there any way to achieve this using OOTB? I saw this documentation, Not sure whether this will be the right approach or not .

 

Can anyone help me to solve this issue?

 

Regards,

entry.title: BRIM Integration/ Strategical relevance of BTP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi folks,

Today I got into trouble with a customer who we have sold Integration Suite as THE strategic platform for his enterprise integration needs. The customer already uses DI for data integration and is super SAP heavy/centric. Now one of the first new projects is introducing SAP BRIM. And I had to learn that SAP proposed to our customer not to use integration suite but instead to use convergent mediation (https://www.sap.com/germany/products/financial-management/convergent-mediation.html) which I did not even know about before.

My customer is furious that we proposed integration suite and now they need another integration product in their first project. Also I saw some BRIM standard content on the business hub, but at the same time convergent mediation seems to be the tool of choice. Is there anybody out there who already implemented BRIM and had to decide between the two integration solutions? Is IS really not suited equally?

This case also makes me wonder why sap would not go for an integration suite first approach for such cases. With the ERP getting more and more modular I am afraid that we will get more such cases where micro solutions get their own integration solution bundled. That would make IS with its recent price raise a more difficult sell since the strategic importance could be questioned.

 Would be interesting to get the communities take on this and some kind of guidance would be highly appreciated.

Thanks,

Peter

 

SAP Integration Strategy SAP Integration Suite @UdoPaltzer @svenhuberti

entry.title: Re: Questions re: "Multi-model with SAP HANA Cloud" developer challenge
entry.content:

I am trying to fix the typo in week3_2 (Closest neighbours section). I fixed the cosine similarity, but for the row_number, I am trying but without sucess yet. 

Here below the complete SQL statement, I tried to (WHERE "B"."row_num" = {random_record}) but it did not work.

I checked previous week SQL statement, but I was able to fix the cosine_similarity function only.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: How to filter job requisitions in Story Reports by operator
entry.content:
Dears,

we are experimenting with Story Reports for Recruiting. We want to provide Recruiters with a Story Report that provides them with data regarding the job requisition that they are responsible for as the main recruiter (not the team).

Story Reports for Recruiting by default provide always all job requisitions where the user is assigned as any operator and even those where the user is just part of the operator team.

I am not seeing any possibility to apply filters, ideally directly in the query, so that the report would just query job requisitions where the user running the report is assigned as the recruiter operator (not the team, not any other operator or team). I tried to build workarounds with calculated columsn, input parameters, whatsoever, but there seems to be no real solution that works without the user running the report having to enter some data and by that giving the possibilty to run the report in an unintended way

Am I overlooking something or is this simply (and that would be unfortunate for the move to Story Reports) a functional gap?

Thanks
Sebsatian

entry.title: SAP Celebrates market leadership in 2024 BARC Score for Integrated Planning and Analytics
entry.content:
The 2024 BARC Score highlights the intensifying need for businesses to adopt comprehensive planning and forecasting tools enhanced by analytics and BI functionalities. As companies grapple with rapidly evolving markets, the seamless melding of these components is not just beneficial but imperative for crafting successful Corporate Performance Management (CPM) strategies. 

At SAP, we are ecstatic about our rating, which emphasises our strengths in providing integrated, user-friendly functionality for enterprise planning and BI, complete with cutting-edge capabilities for augmented analytics and application design in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). SAP's offering empowers users with sophisticated tools like ‘Just-Ask’, 'Smart Predict' & 'Smart Insights' all part of SAP Abalytics Cloud's generative AI features that enable quick and deep data exploration and predictive analytics.

Another prowess of SAP's advanced solutions lies in connectivity. Users of SAP Analytics Cloud’s experience unparalleled live access and direct write-back capabilities with SAP’s own data sources and applications, including SAP S/4HANA and SAP Datasphere. This highlights our commitment to delivering an integrated suite of applications, ensuring that our clients can make the most out of their investments in SAP’s ecosystem.

We are also proactively refining the platform with significant investments into areas such as SQL Live integration and a tighter coupling with SAP Datasphere. The forthcoming enhancements aim to expand native connectivity, not just within SAP’s vast array of applications but also with other systems through already existing open REST APIs and beyond.

At SAP, we view this BARC Score as a powerful motivator to continue perfecting our offerings. It serves as both a confirmation of our strategy and a constructive compass for the journey ahead. We extend our heartfelt gratitude to our customer community, whose invaluable feedback and loyalty inspire us to push the boundaries of what's feasible in the realm of integrated planning and analytics.

Through our united front of BI, planning, and AI, SAP is ready to tackle the future of corporate management. We invite you to witness this transformative journey with us, as we revolutionise decision-making and planning in an ever-dynamic business world.

To our clients and partners – thank you for entrusting us with your aspirations. Together, let's shape a future that is more informed, more agile, and smarter than ever before.

Discover the future of integrated planning and analytics with SAP – where innovation meets strategy.

Faraz Rahim

entry.title: Can we use SAP PI/PO system and SAP Solution Manager in SAP RISE
entry.content:
Background: Planning a migration to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition (Rise) and concerned about the future of certain tools that we are currently using:

Questions 1) Currently have SAP Solution Manager 7.2 in SQL Server 2012 on premise and  would like to know if it is worth planning some type of SQL Server upgrade for this project or is there any other tool that will replace the functionality of the Solution Manager in SAP Rise ?

Question 2) Having 2 PI servers (Process Integrator 7.5) in SQL Server 2012 on premise that act as middleware between the ERP and (SAP SuccessFactors or SAP Concur), and want to know the same way in this conversion process / migration to SAP Rise, how would this component function in the new Rise architecture, will it be replaced by which tool?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Can we use SAP PI/PO system and SAP Solution Manager...
entry.content:
Answer for Question 2)

Yes, you should be able to migrate SAP PI/PO to RISE with no issues.

For the migration please use to SAP official guide from SAP Note 2574603 - PI: Official SAP Guide Finder.

Our only recommendation is that you run the PO wizards after you migrate to RISE, in order the necessary settings (host, port, ip addresses...) could be adjusted:

  • 3051861 - Which CTC Configuration Tasks (Wizards) do I need to execute in my PI/PO systems and when do I execute them?

Also, our official recommendation is that customers migrate to the Cloud as the NW 7.5 will end the maintenance soon:

  • 1515223 - SAP Process Integration and SAP Process Orchestration: Release Recommendation

Please contact you SAP account executive if you have questions regarding your contract.

In the planning model I created a data action that allocates the quantities to the forecast in relation to the quantity ordered. Once the allocation has been carried out, I would like a new data action that allocates only the forecast quantities lower than 1000 TON to the other forecast quantities. it's possible?

Thanks

entry.title: Goods Receipt of material with serial number creates the Technical Obj ( Equip) automatically ,why ?
entry.content:
When using the app POST GOODS MOVEMENT, a  material is posted with 501 movement type and a Material document posted but it creates an Equipment viewable 
in Find Technical Object app

Why and how to prevent ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Goods Receipt of material with serial number creates...
entry.content:
The customizing 'Serial Number With/Without Equipment Requirement' in the Configuration activity Define Serial Number Profiles 103636 determines if an Equipment Master is created for a Serialization Procedures

The 2 possible values are :

01 Proposal: w/o equipment
02 always with equipment

 

When you create a serial number always one equipment is created. The setting '01' in serial number profile indicates that this will not be a 'full equipment' so is not visible through normal apps . However a EQUI record is created and a equipment number is generated

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 What’s New: Leave us your Feedback!
entry.content:
We want to get your feedback on What’s New for SAP S/4HANA Cloud to make the information provided more useful for you. To do this, we are making a new commenting feature available for SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 in a pilot phase that starts now and will end on August 21, 2024. 

There is a new commenting feature available for the What’s New in the release SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408. The feature is now available for this release as part of a pilot that will end on August 21, 2024. With this commenting feature you can leave your direct feedback to the What’s New document authors. During the pilot, authors will evaluate your feedback and incorporate it into the documentation, if needed. We hope that by opening this channel of communication, we can learn how to further improve our What’s New content for you. For this, your feedback is essential! 

To use this feature, you need to be logged into the Help Portal. The feature will only be available in the English version of the documents. To learn more about how the feedback process works in SAP Help Portal, see Giving Documentation Feedback.

entry.title: Preliminary What’s New Information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
entry.content:
Preliminary versions of What’s New information and of the Product Assistance are now available for customers and partners to get a preview on the upcoming new and changed features of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.

You can find this preview on the current Help Portal page SAP S/4HANA Cloud (see What’s New section “Preview of SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408”). To access the Preliminary What’s New information, please use the What’s New Viewer or the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool.

The RASD tool provides you with a personalized and tailored view on What’s New information based on the activated and used scope within your system. The preliminary information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 will be available in RASD within the next few days. We recommend using RASD to prepare for upgrades and updates of your system and to focus on the new and changed features that are relevant for you. A valid S-User ID is needed to use the RASD tool and to view all the preliminary content stated above.

In this release, we will be piloting the new Commenting Feature for What's New documentation. See this blog for more information.

I have a workflow with a USER DECISION STEP where i am passing Firm Informartion (firm name, Address etc) and i want this information to be reflected on the 'DECRIPTION" side and then also have attachments which i have on a table that i want to be passed on the "OBJECTS ATTACHMENTS" Side. The agent should be able to Accept or Reject this information after reviewing it.

I am having problems Attaching the documents on the  "OBJECTS ATTACHMENTS" side was using function module: SAP_WAPI_ATTACHMENT_ADD within a method which i call inside the task, but when i do that it messes up with the generic user decision method as i can't call them both.....only one method can be call within "Basic Data" Tab of the Task
any thoughts how i can do this ??

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - AI Services - Week 4

entry.title: PO versioning in CIG component
entry.content:
Since 2024 we are using CIG component in our SAP backend system to create purchase orders and send them via our interface to Ariba Business Network. We had some months to gain experience with CIG but also collected some issues that we’re now trying to solve.

In CIG component a PO versioning seems to be foreseen. That means that whenever a PO is created, it is marked with version number 1 in the respective SAP table. Whenever a change on that PO is done, version numbers increase in the respective SAP table. Those version numbers are part of the PO Idoc and also transmitted in PO cxml to Ariba Business Network.

According to our backend logic, we do not want to send every single PO change to the supplier. There might always be some internal changes like accounting information, internal texts etc. which are not relevant/interesting for the suppliers. Therefore such changes do not lead to a successful PO output message. Nevertheless, according to CIG standard logic, it leads to an increase of PO version number in the respective SAP table.

Whenever such a PO is cancelled at a later point of time, PO cancellation message is sent with a higher version number than the current active message in Ariba Business Network. As Ariba Business Network expects a cancellation always to have the same version number than the PO message which should be cancelled, this leads to an error message in CIG and PO cancellation not reaching Ariba Business Network.

We would appreciate to receive any best practices, similar experiences or suggested solutions how we could handle those issues in future.

Thanks a lot in advance.

However, when I navigate to the API rule tab and click on the specific API, a new page opens. Instead of displaying the expected Swagger documentation, I encounter a blank page with the error message "no healthy upstream."

Could you please provide any insights or guidance on how to resolve this issue? Ty 🙂

Guillaume

entry.title: Resolving Mapping Issues Between SAP Customer Data Platform and SAP Service Cloud V1
entry.content:
Hello together,

We are currently working on an integration between the SAP Customer Data Platform (CDP) and a SAP Service Cloud V1 tenant. On the CDP side, we are using the Customer Schema "SAP Integrated," which includes arrays for address data. Specifically, we have three array

  • addresses (for postal address information)
  • phones
  • mails

However, on the Service Cloud side, we are utilizing the standard data model of the individual customer object. Here, the underlying navigation property for address entries consolidates all information into a single entry, encompassing address, phone, and mail data.

When attempting bi-directional mapping between these systems, we encounter a significant challenge. We need to map the arrays from the CDP to a single entry in the Service Cloud (C4C) environment. Conversely, one address entry in the C4C environment results in three separate entries in each array within the CDP. This leads to a problem where updating any customer information could generate multiple entries in the C4C, which originally had only one entry.

Example

  • CDP to C4C: The three separate arrays (addresses, phones, mails) in the CDP need to be merged into one entry in C4C.
  • C4C to CDP: A single entry in C4C generates three entries in the CDP arrays. If we update these, the customer record in C4C could mistakenly get multiple entries.

We would like to stay as close to the standard configuration as possible, avoiding custom development if possible.

Does anyone have experience with this kind of integration or suggestions on how to effectively map these data structures while staying close to standard configurations?

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Tomcat web server role in XSA and HANA Cockpit
entry.content:
Besides HANA Cockpit, the only other product that I know that uses TOMCAT is the Business Objects (now known as SAP Data Services).

As stated on the mentioned SAP note, you can't update just TOMCAT, you need to update the whole product.

entry.title: Re: Tomcat web server role in XSA and HANA Cockpit
entry.content: Thanks! Yes, i deal with Business Objects and Data Services too and patch tomcat on regular basis. And we patch HANA cockpit on regular basis to update tomcat. But I am just wondering I could not find tomcat in HANA Cockpit architecture diagram. But thanks for confirming.

entry.title: Inquiry Regarding Note 2469139 Resolve findings of core ERP PP-MRP S/4and Its Impact on S4 Migration
entry.content:
We are currently working on the migration to S4, specifically addressing inconsistencies related to MRP through the readiness check. Concurrently, we have a request from our client to activate the planning area, which requires the creation of two planning areas that include several warehouses.

Upon reviewing note 2469139, we encountered a concern regarding the verification ID MRP_AREA_CUSTOMIZING_007, which states the following:

"Try not to combine different storage locations into one MRP planning area."

This recommendation is particularly concerning since our client's request involves including multiple storage locations in a single planning area. We would like to understand how this setup might impact the S4 migration, given that we are assigning multiple warehouses to a single planning area.

We appreciate your attention to this matter and look forward to your guidance on how to proceed without compromising the integrity of the migration process.

Best regards,

I am passing the value HVORG,TVORG,BUKRS in partnerposition table parameter.I can see in database table for these combination product group value is there.In BAPI I cannot find any parameter to pass value for productgroup nor it is getting selected from any database table internally in BAPI.Then how this productgroup field is coming into picture and giving error.

Is my previous apps deployed in CF will impact the invoice and storage ?

entry.title: SAPMV45A and global variables...
entry.content:
One of my first biggest projects as an SAP developer in the 1990s was the development of SAPScript order confirmation forms for sample deliveries. I remember when the printed papers laid all over the floor sorted by something to check if the information for each organizational attribute was printed correctly.

Well, starting with forms often means: Doing forms forever... 😘 Or at least the next times...

The next step was the printout of the handling unit information of normal sales orders packaging proposals.

The SAP standard form was useless as it printed each and every HU separately. Which makes no sense if you have ~500 HU's where 20 bottles are packed into a box and there are 48 boxes on a palette... So I was asked to compress the data to a readable format like:

1 x palette 
  48 x box 40 x 50 x 60
    20 x bottle 200 ml
   1 x box
    18 x bottle 200 ml

Calculating this compressed information from various different Handling Units was quite a challenging task for me, but it worked at last.

But there was one thing that didn't work. I do not remember exactly, but the function modules I used for reading the handling units behaved differently when the print out was directly processed after saving the sales order. After days of debugging my solution was to implement the function module HU_PACKING_REFRESH (or similar).

Now the printouts where correct and everything was transported to productive system.

After a while users complained that the packaging proposal, that was found and calculated automatically in the sales order, was not saved. It could be seen in the sales order but after saving the packaging proposals were gone. 

Of course everyone was questioned if something that has been transported lately could be the issue with this.

Of course no one was awar of any guilt. Neither was I.

SAP has been contacted and - after a very long time of debugging - they found the solution.

You might have already guessed: it was "my" function module HU_PACKING_REFRESH which killed all packaging information... 😇😇

entry.title: Re: Shared contract
entry.content: Hi Eric.

entry.title: Re: Shared contract

entry.title: Re: Running Your Own Blockchain on The SAP BTP Kyma Trial: A Hands On How To Guide 🚀
entry.content:
Hi Guillaume,

I tried to copy the original formatted YAML files here but couldn't.

Using a process of elimination, and to confirm that the problem is not the YAML files, I've put the YAML files here:

https://www.atkrypto.io/atkrypto-v1.yaml

https://www.atkrypto.io/atkrypto-v2.yaml

Please delete the Namespace(s) and use these as your YAML files and see if it works.

If it still does not work please put some screenshots of what you see in the comments.

Thanks and good luck, we are using this all the time for Demo's and it does work, so don't give up, and let me know what happens.

Thanks,

Andy.

entry.title: Re: PIVOT or Other format Report on ALV-ABAP program
entry.content:
You can review the attached program. Considering the images you sent, you will need a lot of customization. The program is completely portable, you just need to paste the code into SE38 and run it.

https://github.com/sozergul/SAP-ALV-Pivot/

entry.title: Re: How to check whether sap kernel is ext or ex2?
entry.content:
Hello,

I know of two ways.

1) Logon at SAP level, execute the transaction SM51, select any instance and click on "release notes".

There you will see a line saying "Make Variant : ....".

2) Logon to OS level as "SIDadm" and execute "disp+work -V|more".

One of the lines should say "kernel make variant". For example:

--------------------
disp+work information
--------------------

kernel release 722
kernel make variant 722_EXT_REL
DBMS client library
compiled on Linux GNU SLES-11 x86_64 cc4.3.4 use-pr230505 for linuxx86_64
compiled for 64 BIT
compilation mode UNICODE
compile time Jun 2 2024 20:28:36
update level 0
patch number 1321
source id 0.1321
(...)

Regards,

Isaías

entry.title: Re: Company logo not visible on Enable Now Template Custo...
entry.content: In your (active/default) Playback Settings resource go to library > Control Bar and make sure Show Logo is selected.

entry.title: Re: SRM - Einkaufswagen Monitor - Operatoren aktivieren
entry.content:
Hi BP23,

There isn't any configuration to add the operators to more fields. The reason why the operator is available for Purchasing Group is because there is a specific coding to add this criterion with range table support. 

The field is added differently here:

WebDynpro Component /SAPSRM/WDC_UI_SC_AMF_CA
V_AO_SC_SEARCH Search View For Shopping Cart

Method WDDOINIT
*Create a range table that consists of this new data element
lt_range_table = wd_this->m_handler->create_range_table( i_typename = 'BBP_PROC_GROUP' ).


*Add a new field to the selection
lv_description = wd_assist->if_wd_component_assistance~get_text( key = '007' ).

wd_this->m_handler->add_selection_field(
i_id = 'BBP_PROC_GROUP'
i_value_help_type = if_wd_value_help_handler=>co_prefix_searchhelp
i_value_help_id = '/SAPSRM/H_PDO_MON_SC_PURCHGRP'
it_result = lt_range_table
i_no_intervals = abap_true
i_description = lv_description
i_tooltip = lv_description

).

Then, the range values are gathered in the same WDC and view:

Method ONACTIONON_SEARCHBUTTON
CALL METHOD wd_this->m_handler->get_range_table_of_sel_field
EXPORTING
i_id = 'BBP_PROC_GROUP'
RECEIVING
rt_range_table = wd_this->lt_pur_grp.

ASSIGN wd_this->lt_pur_grp->* TO <fs>.


wd_this->mo_mms_sc->/sapsrm/if_cll_mm_search~set_wd_search_context(
ion_wd_search = lon_fields ).
lon_fields->set_attribute(
EXPORTING
name = 'PURCHASE_GROUP1'
value = <fs> ).

Finally the values are provided to the search structures:

/SAPSRM/CL_CH_WD_MMS_SC Shopping Cart search Monitor mapper
/SAPSRM/IF_CLL_MMS_SC~SEARCH

IF ls_criteria_pdo-purchase_group1 IS NOT INITIAL.

lt_pur_grp[] = ls_criteria_pdo-purchase_group1[].

LOOP AT lt_pur_grp INTO ls_pur_grp.
IF ls_pur_grp-high IS INITIAL.
lv_pur_grp_low = ls_pur_grp-low+0(12).
ls_pur_grp-high = ls_pur_grp-low+13(117).
CLEAR ls_pur_grp-low.
ls_pur_grp-low = lv_pur_grp_low.
CLEAR lv_pur_grp_low.
CONDENSE: ls_pur_grp-low, ls_pur_grp-high.
MODIFY TABLE lt_pur_grp FROM ls_pur_grp.
ENDIF.
ENDLOOP.

ls_criteria_pdo-purchase_group1[] = lt_pur_grp[].

APPEND ls_pur_grp TO lt_pur_grp.
ls_criteria_pdo-purchase_group1 = lt_pur_grp.

"" move purchase group field from cll structure to pdo structure
MOVE ls_criteria_pdo-purchase_group1 TO ls_criteria_pdo-purchase_group1.

ENDIF.

In addition this is possible for field Purchasing Group, because this field is added as table type in the relevant data structures /SAPSRM/S_PDO_SC_SEARCH, /SAPSRM/S_CLL_WD_SC_SEARCH.

Therefore adding operator to other fields would require bigger development efforts, but even then it is not guaranteed that further search codes are prepared to handle the range tables and operators. I'm sorry I couldn't provide a more positive answer.

Best regards,
Daniel

entry.title: Re: How to download csv files from AL11
entry.content:
Hello Kimmy

Refer to note https://me.sap.com/notes/2104052 

and 

https://me.sap.com/notes/3151530/E

entry.title: UI5 ODATA to JSON - Empty Structure from Entity for Create of f.e. Sales OrderNew
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

at first: I'm very new to the whole UI5/FIORI/ODATA topic within SAP. So please be kind to me ‌‌
I've done my first few very simple examples and everything was working fine.

Now i try to build a very simple sales quotation creation app. I've created ODATA Service with 2 entities. SalesQuot (for Header) and QuotItem (for Items). I've also done the navigation between this entities and some further needed things. Everything is working fine in this parts.

In my UI5 part i want to bind the SalesQuot data structure to one of my views. For this task i've tried to read the ODATA data via the sap.ui.model.odata.v2.ODataModel and convert it to JSON via oODataJSONModel = new sap.ui.model.json.JSONModel().

But this isn't working and i'm a little bit confused about the correct way to bind a empty structure to my view regarding ODATA -> JSON -> View.

Can anyone tell me the right way to bind a empty JSON structure to my view for my purpose?

Best Regards and TIA
Chris

entry.title: Re: Producer content appears in Instant Producer
entry.content: The source problem here is that it is not possible to set up a default recording dictionary for all Authors. That's something I have asked SAP to provide, via a Customer Influence Request. Maybe you could go vote for that.

entry.title: Going international - Caveats in custom ABAP programs
entry.content:
In this blog-post i want to mention some caveats when implementing SAP for new countries or regions. Primary focus is the ABAP developer perspective, the translation and not the customizing topics.

Regional Differences

Due to business and legal requirements SAP implementations often use different:

  • G/L accounts
  • Chart of accounts
  • Cost centers
  • Tax codes
  • Currency codes
  • Organization structures (sales organization, purchase org., plants, company codes etc.)

for different countries and regions.

So one of the first tasks is to search for hard coded G/L accounts, chart of accounts, cost centers, tax codes, currency codes, sales organizations, purchase organizations, plants and company codes in custom ABAP programs and replace the findings by appropriate variables or customizing tables.

Currency Codes

Replacing hard coded currency codes should be pretty simple. Most transactional data tables have both fields (amount beside and currency code) and the currency code is part of the company settings in table T001, too. So instead of hardcoding the currency code it`s better to read the currency code from the transactional data table where applicable or from the T001-table. If hard coded currency codes are used to decide whether a currency conversion must be performed the decision can be simply omitted as the currency conversion between the same currency lets to the same result.

Calculations done with currency values

Special care must be taken in custom programs, which calculate differences or ratios between two currency values. If the program simply subtract or divides those two values, you will get wrong results when the first value has a different currency than the other. In one of my projects we had this issue, because the programs where build at the time, where SAP was implemented for only one country and all values were in the same currency.

Translation

Translation API

Translating all objects with transaction SE63 is quite impractical as you need to go through every single object. Under the hood the transaction SE63 uses a API, which can be used to build your own more practical translation program. This API (translation API) consists of the following parts:

  • the table LXE_ATTOB, which contains the types of translation objects
  • the function module LXE_OBJ_OBJECTS_GET, which reads the translation objects for a given object type and collection. In case of ABAP development objects the collection is the package.
  • the function module LXE_OBJ_TEXT_PAIR_READ to read the text pairs
  • the function module LXE_OBJ_TEXT_PAIR_WRITE to write the text pairs
  • the function module LXE_OBJ_CREATE_TRANSPORT_ENTRY to append the translation object to a workbench request

The GitHub repository https://github.com/SAP-Easy-Translation/abap_client is a example, how the translation API could be used to select the text pairs from a range of packages and edit or review these text pairs in a more practical way.

Other language dependent texts

The translation needs to cover all language dependent texts. Beside the obvious ABAP development objects (Dictionary-Objects, Text-Elements in programs and classes, T100-Messages, Forms etc.) there are a few more language dependent texts:

  • Descriptions for customizing objects (custom sales documents types, Sales order reasons, Delivery note types, Invoice types, Conditions, Purchase Order Types, Material groups etc.)
  • Report variant descriptions
  • Queries build with transaction SQ01
  • SapScript Standard Texts maintained in transaction SO10

You shouldn't forget to translate these objects, too.

Customizing objects

The descriptions of the customizing objects can be edited directly in the maintenance views or by selecting the object types TADC, TADE, TADG, TADS, TADW, TAIC, TAIE, TAIG, TAIS and TAIW in the translation transaction SE63.

Report variant descriptions

Report variant descriptions can be found under the object types VARI (system variants) and VARX (local report variants).

Queries

Queries can be translated in the transaction SQ02 by going to the menu Environment -> Language comparison.

and by entering the Query and the user group or the InfoSet in the next screen.

Both query and InfoSet should be translated and after the translation you should regenerate the Query program (Transaction SQ01 -> Menu -> Query -> More functions -> Generate program).

SapScript Standard Texts

SapScript Standard Texts are translated in transaction SO10. Enter Text name, Text ID and the target language and press the "Create"-Button or "Change"-Button to translate the text.

SapScript Standard Texts are not automatically added to a workbench request. The program RSTXTRAN must be called to achive this.

Form Printing

When you print SapScript forms or SmartForms, make sure to activate UPE (Unicode Printing Enhancement) as described in note 1812076. Otherwise you will get hashmarks (#) for characters, which are not included in the character set of the printer.

Conclusion

This blog post should show you some of the caveats when implementing SAP for new countries or regions. However there some more cultural differences between regions. Some asian countries like Thailand have two different calendars (buddhist calendar and gregorian calendar) and in some countries like Japan the fiscal year is different from the calendar year. These differences should be keept in mind when dealing with issues or when adapting custom ABAP code for new countries or regions.

entry.title: Re: Producer content appears in Instant Producer
entry.content: I think you're seeing everything Assigned to you - and possibly also everything you are a Watcher on. New SMEs shouldn't see all that.

entry.title: Re: BRIM Integration/ Strategical relevance of BTP Integration Suite
entry.content: It seems it would depend on what the customer is trying to achieve with the project, but I would think IS would fall into the holistic category with BRIM being a niche solution (as the name indicates even).

entry.title: Re: UI5 ODATA to JSON - Empty Structure from Entity for Create of f.e. Sales OrderNew
entry.content: Why wouldn't you use a single OData model with two-way binding?

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 2020 VS2019 Windows Server 2022 IIS
entry.content:
Hello,

In supporting CR SDK's for the past 26 years I don't recall anyone trying to use a .NET and our JS files...

I don't believe it's supported, those JS files under the Viewer folder are for internal use by our Viewer and not supported by direct use.

The error is likely due the Report Engine has not be initialized in your project.

Here's a simplified use of the Engine in a WEB app:

 

using System;
using System.Data;
using System.Configuration;
using System.Linq;
using System.Web;
using System.Web.Security;
using System.Web.UI;
using System.Web.UI.WebControls;
using System.Web.UI.WebControls.WebParts;
using System.Web.UI.HtmlControls;
using System.Xml.Linq;

using CrystalDecisions.Shared;
using CrystalDecisions.CrystalReports.Engine;
using CrystalDecisions.Web;

public partial class _Default : System.Web.UI.Page 
{
    protected void Page_Load(object sender, EventArgs e)
    {

    }
    protected void Page_Init(object sender, EventArgs e)
    {
        CrystalDecisions.CrystalReports.Engine.ReportDocument rpt = new CrystalDecisions.CrystalReports.Engine.ReportDocument();
        rpt.Load("C:\\Reports\\Reports\\General Business\\World Sales Report.rpt", OpenReportMethod.OpenReportByTempCopy);
        CrystalReportViewer1.ReportSource = rpt;
        Response.Write("hello");

    }
}

 

If you want to use Java CR has a CR for Eclipse package here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354088796.html

If you want a sample, Desktop go to the Info page here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

How to use the new CR 2020 export to Microsoft Excel(XLXS) in Visual Studio .NET code (new)

how-to-parameters-in-crystal-reports-for-visual-studio-net

Printing Crystal Reports in .NET

Also note you must install CR for VS using the EXE, in your case the one for VS 2019 to properly integrate into Visual Studio. The one for 64 bit is for VS 2022 since it's a 64 bit application. Also to get all of the registry keys created etc.. You cannot manually distribute the runtime, to many COM dll's to register etc.

MSI's are for redistribution only.

entry.title: Re: UI5 ODATA to JSON - Empty Structure from Entity for C...
entry.content: Does https://stackoverflow.com/a/43282067/5846045 help?

entry.title: What’s New in SAP Central Business Configuration 2406
entry.content:
With the latest release of SAP Central Business Configuration, exciting new features are available. This blog post will provide you with a comprehensive overview of these new features, with insights into how they can help to streamline your day-to-day operations.

Downloading the Configuration Activity List 

We’re delighted to announce that you can now download the list of configuration activities. Specifically, the information displayed on the Business Processes Configuration screen, such as configuration activity title, status, ID, as a spreadsheet. Using the filter options comes in handy, as you can include only the information that you need in the download. With this, you can document the list of configuration activities for offline use and future reference.

Screenshot of the Business Processes Configuration user interface

User Experience Enhancements for Project Settings and more

With the latest user experience enhancements, you gain a better overview through centralized access to project settings: Settings is a new page, including Project Details, Team information, and the Switch Project button.
Additionally, we’ve improved the activity descriptions for better clarity and enhanced the user experience for Business Processes Configuration. Now, the expand/collapse selection made by you stays the same even after a different action is performed.

Screenshot of the Settings user interface

Screenshot of the Business Processes Configuration user interface

That wraps up the new features this time. Make sure to follow the SAP Central Business Configuration tag or follow this dedicated blog collection to stay up to date with the latest blog posts.

Do you have an idea on how to further enhance SAP Central Business Configuration? Go to the SAP Customer Influence portal to submit an improvement request or vote for the ideas of others. This helps us understand your requirements even better and prioritize our work accordingly. We’re looking forward to your improvement requests.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports Memory issue
entry.content:
This is an old marked as Answered post. Please post new question with more detail about which SP you are using etc.

I highly recommend searching also, most Memory issues are due to IIS not being able to defrag memory so you need to do as Microsoft recommends and Cycle IIS at least once a day if not more.

entry.title: Requirement date of components in production order related to different operation
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have the following requirement - components are assigned to operations in my routing. Lets say one component is assigned to operation 0200, because the consumption posting should be done via confirmation of operation 0200 and backflush setting. BUT the requirement date of the component should be the one of the operation 0100 just before? Is that possible in any way (also via badi or enhancement)? The offset time in BOM does not really help as it is a fixed value.

BR Christian

Why i try to convert to JSON is my understanding of the Binding, please correct me if i'm wrong:
When i bind direct via ODATA, there is an update/create to the backend anytime i enter something in my view user interface. Is this correct? What would you prefer me to do?

entry.title: serial number material in a serial number finished good tracability
entry.content:
I have a problem with the serial number management. I should have a production order with a serial number finished good. To produce it, i use a serial number material. When I would confirm the production operation I consume this material with the application MIGO to specify the serials numbers of the material. There are 5 numbers because I use 5 material for product 5 finisheds goods. 

After I do the entry of finished good in stock with the application  "post goods receipt for production order". The 5 finished good appear in stock with his serials numbers. 

I would like to know how see which serial number material is in which serial number finished good for traceability. I should see one material serial number link with one finished good serial number. How i do to obtain that.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: serial number material in a serial number finished go...
entry.content:
In S/4HANA Cloud we have the app Serial Number History  ( https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F7368')/S32 ) for checking all of the business documents that contain a specific serial number and access those business documents to see the details. As an inventory manager, you can use this app to locate a missing item or to track down where possible inconsistencies occurred.

 

The other Apps for serial numbers are

Display Material Serial Number - IQ03
Manage Material Serial Numbers

 

In the app Display Material Serial Number you can see Serial Number History as well

entry.title: Re: UI5 ODATA to JSON - Empty Structure from Entity for Create of f.e. Sales OrderNew
entry.content: Meaning to bind your OData model directly to the view because it supports two-way binding and should not require a secondary JSON model to pass data back and forth from the view.

entry.title: Re: Lock errors using eclipse over the internet
entry.content: Is there a solution for the problem described reason 2 (Internet connection is unstable). I experience the same problem in the BTP, ABAP environment meaning I cant access ST12

entry.title: Re: How to check whether sap kernel is ext or ex2?
entry.content:
To determine whether the SAP Kernel you are using is EX2 or EXT, you can follow these steps:

Steps to Check SAP Kernel Version:

1. SAP GUI Method:
- Open your SAP GUI and log in to your SAP system.
- Navigate to the System Status screen:
- From the SAP Easy Access screen, go to System in the menu bar.
- Select Status.
- In the System Status screen, look for the Kernel Information section.
- Here you will see the kernel version details. The kernel version will have a string similar to `742`, `753`, etc., followed by a designation like EX2 or EXT.

2. SAP Transaction Method:
- Use transaction code SM51 to display active application servers.
- Select one of the servers and click on the `Release Notes` button.
- In the Release Notes window, you will see the kernel version information.

3. SAP Directory Method:
- You can also check the kernel version by accessing the disp+wor executable:
- Connect to the server where your SAP system is running.
- Navigate to the directory where the SAP kernel executables are located. This is usually /usr/sap/<SID>/SYS/exe/run
- Run the command disp+work -version. This will display the kernel version information.

Example of Kernel Version Output:

When you check the kernel version using any of the above methods, the output will show something like this:

Kernel Release: 753
Patch Level: 500
Make Variant: 753_REL
Compilation: Linux GNU SLES-11 x86_64 cc4.3.4 use-pr070203 BUILD TIME: 2018-01-23 10:23:44
EXT
In this example, `EXT` indicates the type of kernel.

entry.title: Seeking Assistance with Fiori ListReport App Grid Table Multiselect Options
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently in the process of developing a Fiori ListReport application and I am aiming to have my table type set as a grid table with multiselect options. I have been creating the ListReport using the Fiori ListReport template in Web IDE, and I am working with UI5 version 1.78.9.

Here is how my manifest.json for table settings is currently configured:

"tableSettings": {
              "type": "GridTable",
              "multiSelect": true,
              "selectAll": true
            }

When I preview the application using the "npm run start" command, everything appears to be in order and nothing seems to be missing. However, when I deploy the application, the checkboxes that should allow for the selection of records are nowhere to be found. It appears as though the table settings were not deployed correctly, as I am able to enable the multiselect option via the web DevTool console using the command: sap.ui.getCore().byId(GridTableName)._getSelectionPlugin().setSelectionMode('MultiToggle').

I have also attempted to resolve this issue by adjusting the table setting to "selectionMode": "MultiToggle" and upgrading the UI5 version, but neither of these solutions have resulted in any changes.

I am hopeful that someone in this forum may have some suggestions or insights that could assist me in resolving this issue.

Best regards,

I need to print that decoded pdf file on to an existing adobe form, any idea how can we do that.?

Or do i have a complete misunderstanding in this issue?

entry.title: Re: Using Badges for Labor Tracking in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hi Manoel,

thank you for this post, it contains very useful details about labor tracking. 

Is it possible to scan the Badge Number instead of typing it manually? I am a bit unsure, whether it is by default possible or do we have to develop a custom plugin for this purpose. 

Our requirement is to provide a functionality, where the first step of the worker is to scan his/her Badge ID to start working.

Thank you,

Best Regards,
Oliver

entry.title: How to link to any performance form through SF story report
entry.content:
Hi,

We're in the process of building a story report in SuccessFactors for performance management but are unable to access specific performance forms to any employee regardless of route map involvement. At the moment, we use a legacy dashboard in which a column with Documents ID's contain a hyperlink to each corresponding performance form. This is the same functionality that can be found in the Classic View -> Detailed Document Search tool.

The Deep Link guide suggestions link to the 'My Forms' inbox page which is not usable for this purpose.

With the legacy dashboard being depreciated in the near future, we need this function in a story report. How can this be achieved?

entry.title: Re: Building a custom Digital Manufacturing Cloud POD Plugin the easy way
entry.content:
Hi Kevin,

I want to enhance the standard POD PTO_PACK_POD/POD for Packing operation by adding a new search field ( similar to custom supplier field described in the examples ).

I am not sure whether I need to create a custom plugin and embed it in this standard POD ( I tried that but the custom plugin is never called ), or I need to clone the examples provided by SAP, manipulate them in BAS and deploy it?.

Can you please guide me on this?. I'd very much appreciate it. Thanks,
Javier

entry.title: Re: UI5 ODATA to JSON - Empty Structure from Entity for C...
entry.content:
I believe you are looking for this -

Adding this line of code (where appropriate) allows you to defer changes until submitChanges is called, and you can also add any additional groups if desired.

oDataModel.setDeferredGroups(["changes"]);

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: Delivery complete indicator reset issue in Service PO
entry.content: You do not need to cancel the SES but you can use the program (assign a T-code) in SAP KBA 1410993 - (Final delivery indicator in service entry sheet not cleared)--to undo Final Service Entry --this allows you to post subsequent SESs and undo delivery completed in PO as well

entry.title: Re: Universal Parallel Accounting in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
@Rajeev_Subhedar At the outset in the previous versions of SAP S/4H private cloud profit center valuation is not supported in UPA, however since OP2023 we have profit center valuation in UPA, but it doesn’t cover balance sheet valuations, only actual goods movements.

Regards

Kazim

entry.title: Delete user in FSM
entry.content:
Hello,

is it possible to delete user in FSM from the DB?

Guido

entry.title: Re: How to implement custom number range for Invoices for...
entry.content:
One other option could be:

You can implement the BADI_SD_INVOICE_EXAMP to define a custom number range for the invoices for rent. Below is an example code to implement the BADI for custom number range:

``` ABAP
DATA: lv_number_range TYPE snro_range_name,
ls_record TYPE snro_record,
lt_number_range TYPE TABLE OF snro_record.

" Define custom number range for invoices for rent
lv_number_range = 'CUSTOM_RANGE_FOR_RENT'.

" Check if the custom number range already exists
SELECT * FROM snro_record INTO TABLE lt_number_range
WHERE snro_name = lv_number_range.

IF sy-subrc NE 0.
" If custom number range does not exist, create new number range record
ls_record-snro_name = lv_number_range.
ls_record-year_exp = '9999'.
ls_record-number_high = '999999'.
ls_record-number_low = '1'.
APPEND ls_record TO lt_number_range.

" Insert new number range record
INSERT TABLE lt_number_range.
ENDIF.
```

You can adjust the code according to your specific requirements and then implement the BADI_SD_INVOICE_EXAMP for custom number range for invoices for rent in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Best Regards,

entry.title: How to clear cache of MyWorkOrderHeaders EntitySet?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We are currently implementing SSAM2305 and our requirements needs  very specific rule for data distribution mode. 

O I changed the OMDO filter on SAM2305_WORK_ORDER_GENERIC , setting WO_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE to Z and implemented BADI /MERP/PM_OMDO_WO_BADI.

At first, when calling ODATA method in /IWFND/GW_CLIENT or via SSAM App, my new method is called, but after some calls, data started to be read from a specific cache on method GET_CACHED_DISTR_KEYLIST.

So, doesn't matter what I change in ABAP code, my method is not being called, returning old keylists everytime.

I had already tried to clear metadata cache in GW_CLIENT, clear cache on /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICES and clear all caches in /n/iwfnd/cache_cleanup, /UI2/INVALIDATE_GLOBAL_CACHES and /UI2/INVALIDATE_CLIENT_CACHES with no success.

Did anybody faced the same problem?

Best regards 

Fabio Purcino
